// developing intelligent systems

Niklas Silla

AI Engineer & Automation Developer

Ich baue agentische Systeme und Automation-Workflows — dort, wo Sprachmodelle aufhören, nur Text zu generieren, und anfangen, Entscheidungen zu treffen.

LLM · LangChain · n8n · Python

// background

M.Sc. Wirtschaftsinformatik

// focus

Agentic AI · Workflows

// next

PhD ab Ende 2026

About

// about

I work at the intersection of information systems and applied AI — from individual automation pipelines to multi-agent architectures, both in research and in applied settings.

My research interests center on the reliability and explainability of agentic systems, their architecture, and concrete application domains such as energy management. I plan to pursue these directions further as part of a PhD.

Research

// research

I plan to start a Ph.D. program at the end of 2026. Current areas of interest:

  • → Reliability und Evaluation von Agentic Systems
  • → Tool-Use als Entscheidungsproblem
  • → AI in betrieblichen Workflows (WI-Perspektive)
